rationale: The brand requires an elite, dark-themed, sophisticated, and results-focused 'boardroom' aesthetic. The combination of Swiss authority (sharpness, grid-focus, contrast) with Jewel & Luxury (deep obsidian, subtle molten copper accents) directly answers the 'CEO/Founder' audience requirement while subtly echoing the parent brand 'The Forge' without being overly artistic.

typography.rationale: Cabinet Grotesk offers an authoritative, high-end business feel, distinct from generic sans-serifs, projecting elite competence. IBM Plex Sans provides exceptional technical readability.

spacing_scale: Generous Spacing: p-6 to p-32. Use tight padding (p-4, gap-4) exclusively in the data-dense 'Revenue Extraction Audit' card. Otherwise, allow content to breathe (py-24 or py-32 for major sections).

motion_guidelines.hover_states: Crisp and subtle. Buttons should slightly lift (-translate-y-0.5) with an increased inner border glow rather than muddy drop shadows.
motion_guidelines.scroll_reveal: Elements should fade in with a very slight upward motion (translate-y-4) on scroll using framer-motion. No aggressive bouncy effects.
motion_guidelines.tracing_beam: Use for the $997 Audit card to draw focus and indicate elite, active tech.

component_guidelines.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with a strict bottom border (border-white/10). Explicit visual separation for 'The Forge' link pointing to ark.metalmindtech.com (e.g., subtle molten copper text or thin outline button).
component_guidelines.hero_section: Dark textured background (overlay on hero image: bg-black/50 to bg-black/70). Heavy bold heading (text-5xl md:text-6xl). 'Undeniable Outcome' promise front and center. Dual CTAs (Primary solid copper, Secondary outlined transparent).
component_guidelines.offer_card_997: Bento-style or stark Tracing Beam card. Needs high contrast. Dark background (bg-[#121212]) with 1px solid border (border-white/10). Itemized value stack using check icons (Hormozi-style).
component_guidelines.revenue_recovery_guarantee: Risk-reversal language. Use a subtle warning/alert motif adapted to luxury (e.g., soft copper/gold glow behind the section).
component_guidelines.outcome_framework: 3-4 step process. Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 or 4). High precision, technical layout (Swiss pattern).
component_guidelines.social_proof: Row of desaturated/white logos. Grayscale outcome numbers (e.g., '+$2.4M ARR').
component_guidelines.founder_letter: Asymmetrical layout (Bezos Day 1 style). Portrait on left, text on right. Use typography to simulate an executive memo (incorporating a subtle monospace font for dates/labels).
component_guidelines.faq: Shadcn accordion, stripped down. No background boxes. Just 1px bottom borders separating questions.
component_guidelines.lead_capture_form: Minimalist input fields (bg-transparent, border-white/20, text-white). Focus state must increase border to solid white/copper. Data goes to MongoDB.
component_guidelines.buttons: Sharp edges or minimal radius (rounded-sm). No pill-shaped buttons.

social_proof_logos.description: Abstract white company logo replacement for social proof.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark metal texture. Perfect for hero overlay.

founder_portrait.description: Executive CEO portrait in black and white.

secondary_background.description: Dark luxury architecture interior. Use as a subtle backdrop for the guarantee or framework section.

testing_attributes.instruction: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role. e.g., data-testid='audit-cta-button', data-testid='forge-nav-link'.

anti_patterns: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard web sans-serifs for headings.
Do NOT use thick gradients across entire backgrounds.
Do NOT center-align everything (use asymmetry to create tension).
Do NOT use pure #000000; stick to #0A0A0A or #121212.
Do NOT create rounded, bubbly UI. Keep radii tight (rounded-none or rounded-sm).
